name: Cinnamon Nut Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except raisins and chopped walnuts in the bread machine.
2. Select the Normal program.
3. Start the cycle; the machine will beep 10 times, five minutes before the end of the second kneading phase.
4. At the beep signals, add the raisins and chopped walnuts to the dough.
5. Complete the baking process as indicated by the machine.
6. Once done, turn off the bread machine.
7. Remove the bread from the machine and allow it to cool completely.
